11 Anthony Magwood-Spann

11 Anthony Magwood-Spann

Summary

Biography

Personal: Hometown: North Charleston, SC ... Hometown newspaper: Charleston News & Record ... Major: Sports Management ... Nickname: Antt ... Favorite Movies: Poseidon, Percy Jackson ... Favorite Book: Harry Potter ... Favorite Meal: Mac & Cheese ... Favorite Class at BC: Spanish ... Why I chose to attend Benedict College: Better Opportunities, better experiences ... Previous college: Andrew College ... Most influential person in my sport career: Anthony Box ... One thing you might be surprised to know about me is: I can talk in sign language ... Favorite TV show: Kick Buttowski ... Favorite professional team: Golden State Warriors ... Favorite website: YouTube ... Music on my playlist: NBA Youngboy, Baby Kid, Jripey ... Dream teammates: Sharife Cooper ... Most memorable sports moment: My First in-game dunk ... Career goal: Win a championship with a high chemistry team and coaching staff ... Favorite Quote: "The biggest comeback is making yourself feel like yourself again".
 

High School: Attended Woodland High School ... High School Coach: Dwight Callaway
